creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
beat        2011-12-24 14:20:41 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Added files:
    devel/binutils/files patch-bfd__config.bfd 
                         patch-bfd__configure 
                         patch-bfd__elf32-ppc.c 
                         patch-bfd__elf64-ppc.c 
                         patch-bfd__targets.c

                         patch-ld__emulparams__elf64ppc_fbsd.sh 
                         patch-ld__emultempl__ppc64elf.em 
  Log:
  - Backport changes from binutils-cvs needed to support 32- and 64-bit
    powerpc
  
  PR:             ports/163041
  Submitted by:   andreast@
  Approved by:    maintainer timeouet (3 weeks)
